projectDescription: GIS Agent is an AI-powered geospatial intelligence platform that lets users create professional GIS applications, run spatial analyses, and publish interactive maps using natural language — no GIS expertise required.
keyFeatures: Natural language GIS task execution — describe spatial needs in plain language, get professional results
115+ built-in GIS tools covering data ingestion, spatial analysis, map rendering, and service publishing
One-click vector and raster tile service publishing from PostGIS spatial database
Support for Chinese coordinate systems (CGCS2000, Beijing 54, Xi'an 80) and domestic GIS standards
Multi-format data ingestion: Shapefile, GeoJSON, CSV, WMS/WFS services, and direct database connections
Multi-format export: PNG, JPG, GeoJSON, SHP, WMS/WFS, PDF, Word, Markdown
Skill (workflow) reuse — successful GIS workflows are saved as shareable, repeatable Skills
Iterative AI-guided refinement with version rollback
SaaS cloud and on-premise deployment options
AI model switching (Qwen, Kimi, and other LLMs) for best results
publicApiSurface: Natural language prompt interface for GIS task execution
Data source specification: new-generation spatiotemporal database, file upload, WMS/WFS endpoints
Map HTML page generation and sharing
Export to PNG, JPG, GeoJSON, SHP, PDF, Word, Markdown
Session management: restart app, version rollback, context continuation
Browser developer tools integration for error diagnosis
Screenshot circle-select feedback for UI issues
